description: a fictional past contract becomes a proposed template with exact-quote clause blocks

input._fixture: fictional signed sponsorship agreement with usage, exclusivity, payment, and approval clauses

assertions: every proposed block body is an exact quote from the fixture with quote_verified true and a confidence label
clause_family keys come from the deal-playbook machine set
the RESEARCH NOTES banner is the first output line and the verbatim save note is present

description: two clauses covering the same family become a proposed variant_group

input._fixture: fictional contract carrying both an organic-only usage clause and an organic-plus-paid alternative appendix

assertions: the two usage clauses are sibling blocks sharing one variant_group with distinct variant_labels
neither body is merged, edited, or summarized

description: placeholders in the example normalize to bracket tokens proposed as fill_fields

input._fixture: fictional terms sheet containing [Name], ___, and {{rate}} placeholders

assertions: each placeholder becomes a [BRACKET_TOKEN] declared in the block's fill_fields
each proposed source guess (profile/deal/rate_card/manual) carries a confidence label
no value is invented for any placeholder

description: spans that map to no block are returned verbatim, never dropped

input._fixture: fictional contract with a hand-written margin note paragraph that fits no clause family

assertions: the margin paragraph appears verbatim in unmapped_text
it is not forced into a clause_family block
